observation_window.failure_reason: The fresh production-readiness rerun passed: the production UI returned HTTP 200, /api/system/backend-status returned HTTP 200 with configured=true, reachable=true and upstream statusCode=200, the direct backend actuator reported UP, and unauthenticated /api/platform/api/v1/auth/me returned the required HTTP 401. The remediation SHA remains verified as deployed. However, the fresh BFF Auth Session Synthetic rerun failed because login returned HTTP 401 instead of HTTP 200. Authenticated /me, refresh, session restoration, logout and post-logout rejection were not reached. This is a failed observation cycle; the consecutive-success counter is reset to zero and REM-P0-002 remains open.
